## Summary

<!-- One or two short sentences: what and why. -->

## Checks

- [ ] Build / compile passes
- [ ] Tests pass, if configured
- [ ] Lint / static analysis passes, if configured
- [ ] Typecheck passes, if applicable
- [ ] UI checked manually, if UI was changed
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] No secrets or local config committed
- [ ] PR targets the correct branch (feature/* → dev, dev → main)
